title: Lovely Golden American Egg Omelette
description: A crispy and peppery American-style omelette perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired brunch.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and pepper until well combined.
In a medium non-stick skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Using a spatula, gently fold the edges of the omelette towards the center, allowing uncooked egg to flow to the edges.
Sprinkle chopped parsley on one half of the omelette.
Add Dijon mustard powder, if using.
Using the spatula, carefully fold the other half of the omelette over the filling.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette onto a plate and serve hot.
Blanch fresh parsley in boiling water for 10-15 seconds, then immediately plunge into an ice bath to stop cooking.
Chop blanched parsley and use as garnish.
